_comment: remove the _ before a non-comment/info propertie to enable it
For more info use json schemas to get a description and allowed value for every properties
For more info on the possible documentation properties check schema and/or the github
apworld_description: Tekken 3 Manual Archipelago randomizes characters, game modes, match settings, Tekken Ball balls, Tekken Force stage access, Team Battle progression, and King of Iron Fist Tournament emblems.
The player manually checks completed objectives in the Manual client and only uses received unlocks once they appear in the tracker.
A 100% completed save file or an Everything Unlocked build is recommended so all characters and single-player modes are available for every seed.

tutorials.name: Multiworld Setup Guide
tutorials.description: A guide to setting up manual game integration for Archipelago multiworld games.
tutorials._comment: if you don't include the authors it will use creator from game.json

_comment_: Enable the generation of puml diagram of your apworld region and locations for debug purposes
